blended.narrative: Killington is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 26 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.4" of snow, highs of 48°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.6" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 18°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
